final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a Jiangnan water-village rapeseed flower season in rural Zhejiang, China, during peak bloom.

Style/medium: photorealistic drone aerial combined with ground-level telephoto, moderate color saturation, poetic and lively pastoral mood in the tradition of Chinese rural landscape photography
Composition: wide establishing aerial view blending into telephoto ground perspective; golden flower fields stretching to the horizon as the dominant plane, traditional village scattered mid-ground, terraced tea hills as distant backdrop
Subject: vast rapeseed flower fields in full bloom — a sea of gold extending to the skyline; white-walled, black-tiled traditional Jiangnan vernacular houses dotted among the flowers with wisps of cooking smoke rising from rooftops; a clear shallow river in the foreground crossed by an ancient stone arch bridge, weeping willows with tender green trailing branches swaying at the bridge's edge; neatly terraced tea gardens on distant hills showing rhythmic green stripes; a few villagers in traditional rural attire working in the fields
Scene/backdrop: ancient village in rural Zhejiang, rapeseed blossom season; clear blue sky with scattered white clouds; terraced tea-garden hills in the far distance contrasting sharply with the golden flower fields
Lighting/mood: natural morning light at approximately 10 a.m., soft directional sunlight, warm golden cast on the flower fields, clean cool blue in the sky, overall mood poetic and full of vitality
Color palette: dominant saturated golden yellow (rapeseed flowers) against cool blue sky; white walls and black roof tiles as neutral anchors; fresh tender green (willow branches and tea terraces) as complementary accent; moderate overall saturation — vivid but not oversaturated
Materials/textures: individual rapeseed flower clusters with visible petal detail, weathered stone arch bridge surface, rippling clear river water reflecting willow green, aged plaster on white walls, layered tea-terrace soil ridges
Avoid: oversaturated HDR processing, plastic foliage, deformed architecture, generic stock-photo flatness, watermark, drone distortion artifacts
